title: HTI Toys & Games Groovy Tunes PACK OF 2 Echo Microphones Red & Blue | Great Singing Toy Prop Mic For Kids and Adults Girls And Boys
features: Become the next singing star. Let your imagination run wild with the groovy Echo mic. They can sing, scream and pretend it's the next big thing. Great for karaoke and singing along to music. Kids will love making echoes with this awesome toy.
Well made of plastic which is strong and durable and safe for kids of all ages, no small parts and shockproof so your toddler can drop the mic what you want.

GREAT GIFT IDEA: The groovy echo mic makes a great little gift for your little ones. Inspire them to be the next big singing icon with this fun toy microphone. Perfect as a birthday present or as a great stocking filler for Christmas.
Product Features: Pack contains two Echo microphones, one red and one blue microphone. made of plastic Suitable for children from 3 years. Please Note: For best effect, shout, speak, sing out loud.

Made with safe, non-toxic ingredients and won't stick to your hands. All our products are tested to the highest UK CE standards to ensure your children's safety, please be cautious comparing to others.
